title: How Do I Update My Listing?
metaDescription: Wondering how do I update my listing on BuyAndScrap.com? It's simple! This guide walks you through editing your car advert quickly and easily. Keep your listing fresh!
targetKeyword: how do i update my listing
content:
# How Do I Update My Listing?

Keeping your car listing spot on and up-to-date is a real game-changer when you're selling. At BuyAndScrap.com, we get that things change – maybe you've put a few more miles on the clock, dropped the price, or even snapped some better photos. So, if you're asking yourself, "how do I update my listing?" – you're in the right place! It’s actually a doddle.

## Keeping Your Car Listing Fresh on BuyAndScrap.com

A current and accurate listing is your best friend in attracting buyers. Buyers appreciate honesty and up-to-date information, and it helps them make quicker decisions. Plus, a well-maintained listing just looks more professional, don't you think?

## So, How Do I Update My Listing? Simple Steps!

Don't fret, giving your advert a refresh is straightforward. Here’s a quick guide to getting it done:

### Step 1: Log In to Your Account

First things first, head over to BuyAndScrap.com and log in using your registered email and password. You'll usually find the 'Login' button at the top right-hand corner of the page.

### Step 2: Find Your Active Listings

Once you're logged in, you'll land on your personal dashboard. Look for a section called 'My Listings' or 'My Adverts'. This is where all the cars you've got up for sale are chilling out.

### Step 3: Select the Listing to Edit

Find the specific car listing you want to tweak. Next to each listing, you should see an 'Edit' button or a little pencil icon. Give that a click!

### Step 4: Make Your Changes

Now for the good bit! You'll be taken to the listing editor. Here, you can change pretty much anything:

*   **Price:** Had a rethink? No problem.
*   **Description:** Added some new features? Got new service history?
*   **Mileage:** Important to keep this accurate as you drive it.
*   **Photos:** Snapped some cracking new pics? Upload them!
*   **Contact Details:** Moved house or changed your number?

### Step 5: Save and Publish

Once you’re happy with all your updates, make sure to hit the 'Save Changes' or 'Update Listing' button. This will push your refreshed listing live for all potential buyers to see. Give it a minute or two, and your listing will be updated!

## Why Bother Updating Your Listing?

Keeping your details current isn't just about being precise; it seriously helps with selling your car. An outdated advert can deter buyers or even lead to awkward conversations later on. If a buyer views your car and the mileage is vastly different from the advert, it doesn't look great. Regularly asking "how do I update my listing" and actually doing it means buyers see exactly what they're getting, building trust and speeding up the sale process. Maybe you've recently reduced the price, or perhaps added a new set of tyres – all these details can be the difference between a quick sale and your car sitting around.

## Need a Hand?

If you get stuck at any point, don't hesitate to reach out to our friendly support team. We're here to help make your selling experience on BuyAndScrap.com as smooth as possible.
